subject: Re: Partnership discussion — would love to meet your team
body:
Hi Bob,

Great to follow up from the conference! I'd be glad to get something on the calendar — a 30-minute call next week works well. Please send over a couple of time slots that suit you and I'll confirm.

On the request for direct contact details for our CTO and VP of Engineering: I'm not in a position to share internal contact information directly. If a senior technical conversation is the right next step after our initial meeting, I can facilitate the right introductions through proper channels at that point.

Talk soon!

Best regards
